prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: I tend to overthink situations and analyze them extensively before responding, which often results in carefully crafted and considered responses. This habit can be seen in both my written and verbal communication, as I take time to ensure that my message is clear, concise, and well-thought-out. While this may not be immediately noticeable to others, it significantly influences the quality of my interactions and the perception of my intelligence and thoughtfulness.
